comments.author: @AMan-zt8tz
comments.text: Sadly Ireland is being taken over slowly but surely by immigration from the middle east and Africa. In one generation, the largest religious faith in this country will be Muslim. The math does not lie. Most of us 'mature' Irish people are heartbroken and are glad to have grown up when we did. But my poor children...
